events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a transmitter installation at the rough-complete stage, but the only photo is blocked by packaging and glare. The identifying mark and connection details cannot be read. This means we cannot verify compliance or proper installation.

Decision: needs_more_info - because we cannot confirm the installation is correct due to obscured photo
Risk: medium - transmitter installation issues could affect process measurement
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: none flagged (empty list) - the issue is with evidence, not the component itself
Percent complete: maybe 70-80% since roughed in but not closed out
Confidence: low since we can't see details
Findings: photo obscured, cannot verify identification or connections
Actions: obtain clear photo or visual inspection
References: API RP 551, mfr manuals
